allow: Bash(find /var/public/pickleplay/app/src/features/home -type f 2>/dev/null; echo "--- features dir ---"; ls /var/public/pickleplay/app/src/features/ 2>/dev/null; echo "--- mcp list config ---"; cat ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo "--- check existing mcp ---"; ls ~/.config/claude* 2>/dev/null)
Bash(command -v claude node npm npx 2>&1; echo "---"; ls -la ~/.claude/local/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---npmglobal---"; ls ~/.npm-global/bin 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/local/bin 2>/dev/null | head)
